title: Who is Chud the Builder? Controversial creator Dalton Eatherly linked to viral chaos and Tennessee shooting investigation
summary_full: Dalton Eatherly, known online as “Chud the Builder,” became famous for controversial livestreams, rage-bait videos, and disruptive public behavior. The influencer is now back in headlines after a courthouse shooting investigation in Clarksville, Tennessee left two people injured. The incident has sparked wider debate about internet fame, shock content, influencer culture, and how online controversy can sometimes spill into real-world situations.
